description: An underwriter is reviewing an auto policy for renewal and runs a new Motor Vehicle Report (MVR).

nodes.task_description: Run a new MVR for the policyholder.

expected_outcome.value: The underwriter retrieves the latest driving record.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the MVR for any new activity.

expected_outcome.value: The underwriter finds a new major violation (e.g., a DUI) on the record.

nodes.task_description: Apply the appropriate surcharge to the renewal premium based on the new violation.

expected_outcome.value: The underwriter adds a significant surcharge to the policy, increasing the renewal premium.
